title: Beyond the Globe
description: Step beyond the familiar and enter a world where massive landscapes, epic exploration, and smooth performance redefine how Minecraft feels. (Big Globe Mods Fabric)
body:
![titel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/62a95a44f580428d0c3e85de20a7c1d66fd027bd.png)

---


[![Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/17e5d47afb1ec97eaf67b51e3922abe80f00bf06.png)](https://discord.gg/r5u6jwpHJY) [![curseforge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/85767d619d6e19ce7285fa1798c07c196575a0ea_0.webp)](https://www.curseforge.com/members/victorwinner/projects)
[![modrinth](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3c39355dab93d38f00808074166bd07c6a1dad9a.png)](https://modrinth.com/user/VictorWinner)

---

Beyond the Globe invites you to explore vast, breathtaking worlds with advanced terrain generation and epic structures.

---

**📷 Media**



---

<details>
<summary>🧱 What's Included?</summary>

**🌎 World Generation & Exploration:**

Powered by **Big Globe**, this modpack delivers massive, realistic worlds with advanced biome logic and terrain generation.  
Exploration is greatly expanded with **Explorify**, **Towns and Towers**, **Unwrecked Ships**, and multiple **YUNG’s structure overhauls** (Better Strongholds & Nether Fortresses), all fully compatible with Big Globe.

**🏗 Structures & Compatibility:**

A wide range of Big Globe compatibility modules ensures seamless integration with:
- YUNG’s Better Strongholds & Nether Fortresses  
- Towns and Towers  
- Explorify  
- Unwrecked Ships  
- Mythic Metals  
- Universal Ores  
- The Graveyard  

**⚔️ Progression & Resources:**

Includes **Mythic Metals**, **Alloy Forgery**, and **Universal Ores**, expanding the tech and resource progression while staying balanced within the world generation.

**⚙️ Performance & Optimization:**

Optimized for smooth gameplay using:
Sodium, Lithium, FerriteCore, ModernFix, ImmediatelyFast, Dynamic FPS, Krypton, Chunky, Concurrent Chunk Management Engine, and FastQuit.  
High performance even in large, distant-horizon worlds.

**🌄 Visual Enhancements:**

Supports advanced visuals with:
- Iris Shaders  
- BSL Shaders  
- Complementary Shaders (Reimagined & Unbound)  
- Distant Horizons  
- Enhanced Block Entities  
- Continuity  
- LambDynamicLights  
- Falling Leaves  
- FreshGrass  

Beautiful visuals without sacrificing stability.

**🖥 UI, Controls & Quality of Life:**

Improved usability with:
Mouse Tweaks, YACL, Language Reload, Reese’s Sodium Options, Sodium Extra, Simple Menu, Debugify, Remove Reloading Screen, Leaves Be Gone, Better View, and Entity Culling.

**🧩 Libraries & Frameworks:**

Includes all required libraries such as Fabric API, Cloth Config, Forge Config API Port, owo-lib, Puzzles Lib, Cristel Lib, YUNG’s API, and Collective for full mod compatibility.
</details>

<details>
<summary>🎯 Who is this for?</summary>

**This modpack is perfect for players who:**

- Love large-scale world generation and exploration  
- Want realistic, expansive terrain and improved structures  
- Enjoy shader-enhanced visuals and distant horizons  
- Prefer a performance-optimized but immersive experience  
- Want a polished exploration-focused Fabric modpack  
</details>

<details>
<summary>💡 Note</summary>

Built for **Minecraft 1.21.4 (Fabric)**.  
All mods are preconfigured and compatibility-tested — just install, generate a world, and explore **Beyond the Globe** 🌍.
</details>
